## orch-go usage

Show Claude Max usage limits

### Synopsis

Show Claude Max weekly usage limits.

Reads OAuth token from OpenCode's auth.json and fetches usage data
from the Anthropic API.

```
orch-go usage [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help   help for usage
```
